name: workspace-path-relative-segments
title: Support dot and relative path segments in workspace path normalization
description: Workspace path normalizers reject '.', '..', and empty segments with WORKSPACE_PATH_INVALID. Models habitually call list('.') to enumerate the root, wasting a round on an avoidable error. Add '.'/relative-segment support (clamp '..' at root) per model training conventions; extract the triplicated normalizePathBase into a shared helper; update AI-facing error text.
creator: baisha
